AValue.description: Percentage of the cone of vision occupied by the clipped activity area.

Occulsion.description: Percentage of the cone of vision occupied by heads occluding the activity area.

FullActivityArea.description: Activity area projected to the spectator's viewing plane. Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

ClippedActivityArea.description: Resulting Polyline after clipping the full activity area with the cone of vision. Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

ConeOfVision.description: Effective cone of vision orientated to the spectator. Polyline: A curve consisting of a continuous chain of straight line segments. The Polyline is considered closed if the first and last ControlPoints are coincident.

ReferencePoint.description: Point representing the spectator's singular eye reference. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

OccludingHeads.description: Polylines of the spectator heads occluding the view of the activity area.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
